title: dianthus superbus var. taiwanensis
intro: Dianthus superbus var. taiwanensis, also known as Taiwan carnation or Taiwan pink, is a variety of flowering plant in the carnation family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in digestion, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and immune-boosting properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared for medicinal use through herbal infusions or decoctions, and it may also be used in the form of tinctures or dried extracts for various health benefits.
